caption: In an indoor office setting, a man in a dark grey suit with a patterned red tie stands centrally, positioned in front of a flat-screen television and a framed picture on the wall. To his left, another man wearing a white dress shirt is visible, and to his right, a woman with blonde hair wearing a dark turtleneck is partially seen. As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit shifts his expression from a focused, neutral look to an open-mouthed speaking gesture, while his right hand begins to move slightly. The man in the white shirt remains in the lower-left foreground, his expression shifting as he speaks or reacts. The woman on the right remains relatively still, looking toward the center. The background remains constant, showing a neutral-colored wall and the edge of the electronic equipment.
